name: Spicy Eggplant in Ginger-Tamarind Sauce (Masala Vangi)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup packed flaked coconut (fresh or canned, unsweetened)
1/2 tsp coarse salt; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the tamarind sauce by dissolving tamarind pulp in boiling water.
2. Wash and slice the eggplant into thin rounds.
3. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
4. Add garlic, ground coriander, cinnamon, cloves, and salt to the pan; stir-fry until fragrant.
5. Add coconut and cayenne pepper; cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Pour in the tamarind sauce and bring to a simmer.
7. Gently drop eggplant rounds into the sauce, cooking until tender (about 10 minutes).
8. Remove from heat; stir in molasses or brown sugar.
9. Sprinkle with black mustard seeds before serving.
